## Week in Review: 2026-04-27 to 2026-05-03

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 6.3.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.4 (+30.8% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.03)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 1.7 (+20.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.31)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.0 (-22.2% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.24)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 6.3 (+25.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.13)
